title: Technical Writers
description: Write technical materials, such as equipment manuals, appendices, or operating and maintenance instructions. May assist in layout work.

tasks.text: Organize material and complete writing assignment according to set standards regarding order, clarity, conciseness, style, and terminology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records and files of work and revisions.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Edit, standardize, or make changes to material prepared by other writers or establishment personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select photographs, drawings, sketches, diagrams, and charts to illustrate material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview production and engineering personnel and read journals and other material to become familiar with product technologies and production methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain online help documentation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist in laying out material for publication.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study drawings, specifications, mockups, and product samples to integrate and delineate technology, operating procedure, and production sequence and detail.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for typing, duplication, and distribution of material.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Observe production, developmental, and experimental activities to determine operating procedure and detail.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review manufacturer's and trade catalogs, drawings and other data relative to operation, maintenance, and service of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze developments in specific field to determine need for revisions in previously published materials and development of new material.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draw sketches to illustrate specified materials or assembly sequence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review published materials and recommend revisions or changes in scope, format, content, and methods of reproduction and binding.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with customer representatives, vendors, plant executives, or publisher to establish technical specifications and to determine subject material to be developed for publication.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
